title: Jamaican Stir Fry with Sauteed Vegetables
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the spices of Jamaica with the crunch of sautéed vegetables. Perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and sauté for 2-3 minutes until softened.
Add the mixed vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the Jamaican seasoning and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
